high_concern_flags.subject: us_arkansas_siblings_wave_n
high_concern_flags.detail: Chip-nav references Arkansas sibling pages (wage-overtime-and-meal-break-law, paid-family-and-sick-leave) and the Arkansas state parent that don't exist yet. Plain-text rendering used for the United States parent and Arkansas state-parent in the links-rail. Retrofit chip-nav anchors when those Arkansas children ship in wave 4.

high_concern_flags.subject: arkansas_eeoc_deferral_status_legacy_source_drift
high_concern_flags.detail: Some legacy sources still list Arkansas as a deferral state (incorrect post-1993, since ACRA has no enforcement agency). Verified against current EEOC FAQ, LegalAid Arkansas, and Super Lawyers; resolved in favour of 180-day federal charge window. ACRA itself runs on a 1-year private-suit statute.
